verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified South Africa. The specialists provided strong, image-grounded evidence (Pty Ltd, Jacarandas, red soil) that was effectively utilized by the tournament judge to eliminate incorrect candidates and confirm the truth.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified English text and Latin script.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described red soil and vegetation.
